findings.detail: J10: 6-pin connector has no ground pins
findings.summary: Connector J10 has no ground pins (6 pins)
findings.description: Connector J10 has 6 signal pins but no ground pins.
findings.recommendation: Add ground pin(s) for EMI control.

findings.detail: J12: 8-pin connector has no ground pins
findings.summary: Connector J12 has no ground pins (8 pins)
findings.description: Connector J12 has 8 signal pins but no ground pins.
findings.recommendation: Add ground pin(s) for EMI control.

findings.detail: J13: 9 signal pins per ground pin (recommended: ≤3 for EMI control)
findings.description: Connector J13 has 9.0 signal pins per ground pin.
findings.recommendation: Add more ground pins (target ≤3 signal pins per ground).

findings.detail: J15: 5 signal pins per ground pin (recommended: ≤3 for EMI control)
findings.description: Connector J15 has 5.0 signal pins per ground pin.
findings.recommendation: Add more ground pins (target ≤3 signal pins per ground).

findings.detail: J16: 5 signal pins per ground pin (recommended: ≤3 for EMI control)
findings.description: Connector J16 has 5.0 signal pins per ground pin.
findings.recommendation: Add more ground pins (target ≤3 signal pins per ground).

findings.summary: No datasheets directory found (18/45 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
findings.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

findings.summary: Single-pin net: IMU_THUMB_INT2_TBD only connects to J2.9 (Pin_9) (passive)
findings.description: Net 'IMU_THUMB_INT2_TBD' has exactly one pin: J2.9 (Pin_9), pin_type='passive'. Verify the intended target — if this pin should connect somewhere, the wire/label is missing.
findings.recommendation: Check the schematic at the referenced pin — add the missing wire or place a no-connect marker if the pin is intentionally floating.

findings.description: Protection device (reverse_polarity) on +5V_PROTECTED
Fuse/polyfuse protection on +5V_FUSED
Power regulator (LDO) detected

findings.summary: U1 pin INT1 (FINGER_INT1) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin INT1 on U1 (ISM330DHCX PROVISIONAL — VERIFY CURRENT ST DATASHEET) is connected to net FINGER_INT1 but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from FINGER_INT1 to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin INT1 is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U1 pin INT2 (FINGER_INT2_TBD) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin INT2 on U1 (ISM330DHCX PROVISIONAL — VERIFY CURRENT ST DATASHEET) is connected to net FINGER_INT2_TBD but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from FINGER_INT2_TBD to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin INT2 is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.description: Net +5V_EXT carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.recommendation: Unable to determine default conduction from symbol/footprint. Inspect manually.

findings.summary: Sourcing gap: 14/28 unique BOM parts have an MPN (50%). Populate before fab.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 14 of 28 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (50.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

text_annotations.text: PCB_glove — DETAILED SCHEMATIC PREPARATION OVERVIEW
DRAFT ONLY
NOT FOR FABRICATION
DK PIN MAPPING TBD
CAMERA CIRCUIT BLOCKED PENDING DOCUMENTATION
CONNECTOR MPN/FOOTPRINT TBD
RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT
STM32N6570-DK is the host. This project is an adapter/interface/sensor draft — not a bare STM32N6 controller.
Global logical net names connect the detailed sheets. Physical DK pins, production connectors, power architecture, and camera implementation remain blocked/TBD.
No PCB layout, routing, fabrication output, final footprint, or verified camera circuit is authorized by this schematic package.
STM32N6570-DK FOUR-CONNECTOR DIGITAL INTERFACE - DRAFT DEVELOPMENT HARDWARE
DK POSITIVE POWER PINS MUST NOT CONNECT TO PCB_GLOVE
PCB_GLOVE POWERED THROUGH J9 EXTERNAL INPUT ONLY
CN8-2 IOREF, CN8-4 3V3, CN8-5 5V, CN8-8 VIN: EXPLICIT NO-CONNECT. CN8-1 NC and CN8-3 RESET also DNC.
CN7 DNC: pins 1,2,3,5,6. CN11 DNC: pins 1,2. CN12 DNC: pins 8 AREF, 9 SDA, 10 SCL.
J14 SPI cavities: 1 SCK, 2 GND, 3 MISO, 4 GND, 5 MOSI, 6 DNC / NO TERMINAL.
J15 CS cavities: 1 THUMB, 2 GND, 3 INDEX, 4 MIDDLE, 5 RING, 6 PINKY.
J16 INT cavities: 1 THUMB, 2 GND, 3 INDEX, 4 MIDDLE, 5 RING, 6 PINKY.
CS PULL-UPS KEEP ALL IMUS DESELECTED WHILE DK IS OFF, RESETTING, BOOTING, HALTED, OR DISCONNECTED
R18-R22 = 10k to +3V3_IMU on glove side. PROVISIONAL - PHYSICAL RESET/BACKFEED VALIDATION REQUIRED.
SPI5 initial firmware: MODE 3, IDLE HIGH, SOFTWARE NSS, 100 kHz-1 MHz. Final speed requires signal-integrity validation.
ISM330DHCX INT1: active-high push-pull. MCU inputs: no internal pull. EXTI: thumb 10, index 5, middle 9, ring 0, pinky 11.
DEFERRED PHYSICAL VALIDATION - NOT MEASURED
NOT PHYSICALLY QUALIFIED / NOT WEARABLE QUALIFIED / NOT FOR FABRICATION
FIVE-FINGER IMU CENTRAL DISTRIBUTION
CONNECTOR FAMILY / MPN / PRODUCTION PIN ORDER / CABLE / FOOTPRINT TBD
THUMB_IMU LOGICAL TABLE: 1 GND | 2 +3V3_IMU | 3 GND | 4 SCK | 5 MOSI | 6 MISO | 7 CS_N | 8 INT1 | 9 INT2/NC TBD
THUMB: ESD/TVS PLACEHOLDER TBD — select only after harness and capacitance review
INDEX_IMU LOGICAL TABLE: 1 GND | 2 +3V3_IMU | 3 GND | 4 SCK | 5 MOSI | 6 MISO | 7 CS_N | 8 INT1 | 9 INT2/NC TBD
INDEX: ESD/TVS PLACEHOLDER TBD — select only after harness and capacitance review
MIDDLE_IMU LOGICAL TABLE: 1 GND | 2 +3V3_IMU | 3 GND | 4 SCK | 5 MOSI | 6 MISO | 7 CS_N | 8 INT1 | 9 INT2/NC TBD
MIDDLE: ESD/TVS PLACEHOLDER TBD — select only after harness and capacitance review
RING_IMU LOGICAL TABLE: 1 GND | 2 +3V3_IMU | 3 GND | 4 SCK | 5 MOSI | 6 MISO | 7 CS_N | 8 INT1 | 9 INT2/NC TBD
RING: ESD/TVS PLACEHOLDER TBD — select only after harness and capacitance review
PINKY_IMU LOGICAL TABLE: 1 GND | 2 +3V3_IMU | 3 GND | 4 SCK | 5 MOSI | 6 MISO | 7 CS_N | 8 INT1 | 9 INT2/NC TBD
PINKY: ESD/TVS PLACEHOLDER TBD — select only after harness and capacitance review
R1/R2 reserve source damping for SCK/MOSI. R3–R12 reserve per-branch MISO/CS options. Final values require assembled-harness oscilloscope testing.
INT1 is direct per finger. INT2 remains optional/TBD. Two ground contacts are retained in the logical connector budget.
DK_IMU_SPI_SCK_TBD and DK_IMU_SPI_MOSI_TBD are the unverified DK-side nets; R1/R2 separate them from the conditioned harness buses.
REUSABLE REMOTE FINGER IMU MODULE — REFERENCE SCHEMATIC ONLY
ISM330DHCX PROVISIONAL — VERIFY AGAINST CURRENT ST DATASHEET
This sheet describes a separate reusable finger PCB concept; it is not automatically part of the central adapter PCB layout.
PIN 1 / PACKAGE ORIENTATION: verify current ST package drawing and land pattern before any layout.
ORIENTATION TODO: add visible X/Y/Z axes, finger identity, PCB revision, pin 1 marker, and mounting-side convention.
C1/C2 100 nF and C3 bulk placeholder are provisional. Place local capacitors close to U1 supply/return pins after datasheet verification.
Standard KiCad LGA-14 footprint is assigned provisionally only; symbol/pad map and land pattern are not locally document-verified.
Embedded symbols use PCB_glove_Draft IDs because their cached graphics/pin types are intentionally provisional; refresh and verify against current libraries and ST data before layout.
EXTERNAL BENCH 5 V INPUT, LOCAL +3V3_IMU LDO, AND TEST ACCESS
DRAFT ONLY — NOT FOR FABRICATION — POWER BUDGET AND PROTECTION PARTS REQUIRE REVIEW
PIN 1 = +5V_EXT — PIN 2 = GND
VERIFY CABLE POLARITY: XHP-2 CAVITY 1 = +5 V, CAVITY 2 = GND
JST XH IS BENCH-PROTOTYPE ONLY; TALL/SNAG-PRONE FOR FINAL WEARABLE
EXTERNAL BENCH 5 V INPUT — PROTOTYPE ONLY
CURRENT LIMIT MUST BE SET BEFORE POWER-UP — NOT FINAL WEARABLE POWER
DO NOT CONNECT DK +5 V TO +5V_EXT — DK +3.3 V IS NOT CONNECTED TO +3V3_IMU
PPTC IS SECONDARY PROTECTION — BENCH-SUPPLY CURRENT LIMIT IS PRIMARY DURING BRING-UP
EXTERNAL BENCH SUPPLY RETURN — VALID ONLY WITH J_PWR_IN CONNECTED
+5V_REG_IN SOURCE FLAG REPRESENTS J_PWR_IN THROUGH F1, D1, AND CLOSED JP1 — VALID ONLY WITH EXTERNAL BENCH SUPPLY CONNECTED
F1 1206L010/30WR AND D1 B140-13-F ARE PROVISIONAL; INPUT ESD REMAINS DNP/TBD
ESD PLACEHOLDER HAS NO SELECTED MPN OR POPULATED FOOTPRINT — DO NOT ADD AN UNVERIFIED TVS
VERIFY D1 CATHODE BAND ORIENTATION BEFORE LAYOUT — K/PAD 1 FACES +5V_PROTECTED
U2 TLV75533PDBVR: EN TIED TO IN; CIN/COUT 2.2uF NOMINAL, EFFECTIVE >0.47uF; REVIEW REVERSE CURRENT
JP1 IS A BENCH-ONLY REMOVABLE CURRENT SHUNT; TALL/SNAG-PRONE AND NOT A FINAL WEARABLE CHOICE
DK AND PCB_glove SHARE GND ONLY THROUGH THE SIGNAL INTERFACE — CAMERA CIRCUITRY REMAINS BLOCKED/TBD
LAYOUT IS NOT AUTHORIZED — RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT
POWER ORDER: J9 -> F1 -> +5V_FUSED / TP20 -> D1 -> +5V_PROTECTED / TP19 -> JP1 -> U2
Power test-point pads, including TP20 / TP_5V_FUSED on the F1-D1 node, use provisional 1.5 mm KiCad footprints; accessibility, spacing, finish, and probe-slip risk require layout review.
J9/F1/D1/JP1/U2/C4/C5 fields and footprints are provisional selections only; no production land-pattern or wearable-mechanical verification is claimed.
U2 DBV FOOTPRINT OVERLAY AND PIN-1 ORIENTATION ARE REQUIRED BEFORE LAYOUT; REVERSE-CURRENT/BACKFEED BEHAVIOR REMAINS OPEN.
CAMERA PLACEHOLDERS — NO APPROVED CAMERA SCHEMATIC
CAMERA CIRCUIT BLOCKED PENDING DOCUMENTATION
CAM1_PLACEHOLDER
CAM-6GY-152VIS / CAM-66GY connector and STM32N6570-DK compatibility are unresolved.
No connector, footprint, rail, sequencing, MIPI lane, I2C, clock, reset, GPIO, or protection wiring is defined.
CAM2_PLACEHOLDER
A second simultaneous DK camera path is unproven; only one dedicated DK camera connector was identified in preliminary notes.
No connector, footprint, rail, sequencing, MIPI lane, I2C, clock, reset, GPIO, or protection wiring is defined.
Prior proposal note: DK CN14 is 22-pin while CAM-6GY is 30-pin; direct mechanical compatibility is not established.
Official local documents required: UM3300, MB1939 schematic, CAM-66GY data brief, VD66GY datasheet, and integration manual.
Camera rails (2.8 V / 1.8 V / 1.15 V preliminary), sequencing, CSI lanes, control, clock, reset, GPIO, and connector footprint must be proven.
NO CAMERA SCHEMATIC IS APPROVED BEYOND THESE PLACEHOLDERS.
DESIGN NOTES, BLOCKERS, AND REVIEW GATES
1. DRAFT ONLY / NOT FOR FABRICATION / RUN FULL REVIEW BEFORE PCB LAYOUT.
2. DK PIN MAPPING TBD: obtain and review local UM3300 + MB1939 schematic; map Arduino/STMod+ overlaps and solder bridges.
3. CONNECTORS TBD: select finger, DK adapter, and power connector families only from exact MPN drawings and glove-mechanical requirements.
4. IMU: confirm current ISM330DHCX datasheet, lifecycle, SPI timing, reset behavior, supply limits, symbol pins, pad map, and land pattern.
5. HARNESS: define maximum branch lengths, ground references, strain relief, bend cycles, shielding/EMI needs, and oscilloscope test plan.
6. POWER: calculate DK headroom and five-IMU worst-case/transient load; decide dedicated +3V3_IMU regulator and protection.
7. CAMERAS BLOCKED: no wiring or footprints until exact DK/CAM documents and one/two-camera feasibility are proven.
8. FOOTPRINTS: all DRAFT_ local footprints are preparation aids only; do not place on PCB before mechanical and manufacturing review.
9. ERC: retain and explain every warning; do not suppress warnings to imply readiness.
10. FINAL GATE: independent schematic, power, connector, footprint, pin-map, signal-integrity, and wearable-safety review before layout.

observations: +3V3_IMU: highest SRF is 22.51 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage
+5V_REG_IN: highest SRF is 4.06 MHz — consider adding small (100pF-1nF) MLCC for >100 MHz coverage

top_issues.detail: J10: 6-pin connector has no ground pins
top_issues.summary: Connector J10 has no ground pins (6 pins)
top_issues.description: Connector J10 has 6 signal pins but no ground pins.
top_issues.recommendation: Add ground pin(s) for EMI control.

top_issues.summary: Connector J12 has no ground pins (8 pins)

top_issues.recommendation: Add ground pin(s) for EMI control.

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found (18/45 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
top_issues.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

top_issues.summary: U1 pin INT1 (FINGER_INT1) missing pull-up resistor
top_issues.description: Pin INT1 on U1 (ISM330DHCX PROVISIONAL — VERIFY CURRENT ST DATASHEET) is connected to net FINGER_INT1 but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from FINGER_INT1 to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin INT1 is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

top_issues.summary: U1 pin INT2 (FINGER_INT2_TBD) missing pull-up resistor
top_issues.description: Pin INT2 on U1 (ISM330DHCX PROVISIONAL — VERIFY CURRENT ST DATASHEET) is connected to net FINGER_INT2_TBD but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from FINGER_INT2_TBD to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin INT2 is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

top_issues.summary: +5V_EXT has no declared source
top_issues.description: Net +5V_EXT carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

top_issues.summary: Sourcing gap: 14/28 unique BOM parts have an MPN (50%). Populate before fab.
top_issues.description: Sourcing audit: 14 of 28 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (50.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
top_issues.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.
